globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://js.monitor.azure.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://js.monitor.azure.com https://*.in.applicationinsights.azure.com https://*.livediagnostics.monitor.azure.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'
